# InvenTrack

*"InvenTrack makes tool management smarter and more reliable."*

## How to Contribute

1. Fork the repository
2. Create a feature branch: `git checkout -b feature/my-feature`
3. Commit your changes: `git commit -m "Add: my feature"`
4. Push to your fork: `git push origin feature/my-feature`
5. Open a Pull Request

## Ideas for Contributions

- Additional scanner hardware support (ESP32-based scanner)
- MQTT transport alternative to HTTP
- Mobile app (Flutter / React Native)
- Indoor positioning / triangulation algorithm
- Battery level monitoring for ESP32 tags
- Docker Compose setup for self-hosted n8n

## Code Style

- MicroPython: Follow PEP 8, add docstrings to functions
- JavaScript/HTML: Use 2-space indentation

## Reporting Issues

Please include:
- Hardware versions (ESP32 model, Pico 2W firmware version)
- n8n version
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behavior
